CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HANK SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-12-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-15-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-22-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-12-1993, CONTINUED TO AUG-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HANK HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP), CALENDAR OF JUL-21-1993 PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED. UPON CONSIDERING ALL EVIDENCE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 LOAN, $1,500.00 WAGES AND $4,500.00 EXEMPLARY/PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, HANK $16,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $390.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,390.00, THIS IS ON A PROVE-UP HEARING. THE PRINCIPAL CONSTITUTES IN $10,000.00 IN MONEY LOANED, $1,500.00 IN WAGES AND $4,500.00 IN EXEMPLARY/PUNITIVE DAMAGES. 7/27/93 - CLERK'S NOTICE OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED. CIVMC
